name: 12_specific_source_terms
statement:
WITH source_text AS (
SELECT 'ext_mssql_asset_vision_ven_gen7' AS catalog_name, 'module' AS source_table, ModuleName AS matched_value,
       lower(concat_ws(' ', ModuleName, Name, Comments)) AS text_value
FROM `ext_mssql_asset_vision_ven_gen7`.dbo.module
WHERE Deleted = false
UNION ALL
SELECT 'ext_mssql_asset_vision_ven_gen7' AS catalog_name, 'formfield' AS source_table, Name AS matched_value,
       lower(concat_ws(' ', Name, Value)) AS text_value
FROM `ext_mssql_asset_vision_ven_gen7`.dbo.formfield
WHERE Deleted = false
UNION ALL
SELECT 'ext_mssql_asset_vision_ven_rms' AS catalog_name, 'module' AS source_table, ModuleName AS matched_value,
       lower(concat_ws(' ', ModuleName, Name, Comments)) AS text_value
FROM `ext_mssql_asset_vision_ven_rms`.dbo.module
WHERE Deleted = false
UNION ALL
SELECT 'ext_mssql_asset_vision_ven_rms' AS catalog_name, 'formfield' AS source_table, Name AS matched_value,
       lower(concat_ws(' ', Name, Value)) AS text_value
FROM `ext_mssql_asset_vision_ven_rms`.dbo.formfield
WHERE Deleted = false
UNION ALL
SELECT 'ext_mssql_asset_vision_ven_vicroads' AS catalog_name, 'module' AS source_table, ModuleName AS matched_value,
       lower(concat_ws(' ', ModuleName, Name, Comments)) AS text_value
FROM `ext_mssql_asset_vision_ven_vicroads`.dbo.module
WHERE Deleted = false
UNION ALL
SELECT 'ext_mssql_asset_vision_ven_vicroads' AS catalog_name, 'formfield' AS source_table, Name AS matched_value,
       lower(concat_ws(' ', Name, Value)) AS text_value
FROM `ext_mssql_asset_vision_ven_vicroads`.dbo.formfield
WHERE Deleted = false
UNION ALL
SELECT 'ext_mssql_asset_vision_vns_gen7' AS catalog_name, 'module' AS source_table, ModuleName AS matched_value,
       lower(concat_ws(' ', ModuleName, Name, Comments)) AS text_value
FROM `ext_mssql_asset_vision_vns_gen7`.dbo.module
WHERE Deleted = false
UNION ALL
SELECT 'ext_mssql_asset_vision_vns_gen7' AS catalog_name, 'formfield' AS source_table, Name AS matched_value,
       lower(concat_ws(' ', Name, Value)) AS text_value
FROM `ext_mssql_asset_vision_vns_gen7`.dbo.formfield
WHERE Deleted = false
UNION ALL
SELECT 'ext_mssql_asset_vision_vnz_gen7' AS catalog_name, 'module' AS source_table, ModuleName AS matched_value,
       lower(concat_ws(' ', ModuleName, Name, Comments)) AS text_value
FROM `ext_mssql_asset_vision_vnz_gen7`.dbo.module
WHERE Deleted = false
UNION ALL
SELECT 'ext_mssql_asset_vision_vnz_gen7' AS catalog_name, 'formfield' AS source_table, Name AS matched_value,
       lower(concat_ws(' ', Name, Value)) AS text_value
FROM `ext_mssql_asset_vision_vnz_gen7`.dbo.formfield
WHERE Deleted = false
UNION ALL
SELECT 'ext_mssql_asset_vision_vsm_gen7' AS catalog_name, 'module' AS source_table, ModuleName AS matched_value,
       lower(concat_ws(' ', ModuleName, Name, Comments)) AS text_value
FROM `ext_mssql_asset_vision_vsm_gen7`.dbo.module
WHERE Deleted = false
UNION ALL
SELECT 'ext_mssql_asset_vision_vsm_gen7' AS catalog_name, 'formfield' AS source_table, Name AS matched_value,
       lower(concat_ws(' ', Name, Value)) AS text_value
FROM `ext_mssql_asset_vision_vsm_gen7`.dbo.formfield
WHERE Deleted = false
), matched AS (
  SELECT catalog_name, source_table, matched_value,
         CASE
           WHEN text_value RLIKE '(^|[^a-z])omcs([^a-z]|$)' THEN 'OMCS'
           WHEN text_value RLIKE 'retina' THEN 'RetinaVision/Retina'
           WHEN text_value RLIKE '(^|[^a-z])aid([^a-z]|$)|automatic incident detection|incident detection' THEN 'AID / incident detection'
           WHEN text_value RLIKE 'dash.?cam|dash camera' THEN 'dashcam'
           WHEN text_value RLIKE 'camera|cctv' THEN 'camera/CCTV'
           WHEN text_value RLIKE '(^|[^a-z])gps([^a-z]|$)' THEN 'GPS'
           WHEN text_value RLIKE 'jet fan|(^|[^a-z])fan([^a-z]|$)' THEN 'jet/fan'
           WHEN text_value RLIKE 'telemetry|telematics|vehicle location|vehicle stopped|alarm' THEN 'telemetry/alarm'
           WHEN text_value RLIKE 'dtims' THEN 'dTIMS'
           WHEN text_value RLIKE 'as-built|as built|handover|geojson' THEN 'handover/as-built/geojson'
           WHEN text_value RLIKE '(^|[^a-z])ai defect([^a-z]|$)|ai-detected|ai detected|artificial intelligence' THEN 'AI defect'
         END AS term
  FROM source_text
  WHERE text_value RLIKE '(^|[^a-z])omcs([^a-z]|$)|retina|(^|[^a-z])aid([^a-z]|$)|automatic incident detection|incident detection|dash.?cam|dash camera|camera|cctv|(^|[^a-z])gps([^a-z]|$)|jet fan|(^|[^a-z])fan([^a-z]|$)|telemetry|telematics|vehicle location|vehicle stopped|alarm|dtims|as-built|as built|handover|geojson|(^|[^a-z])ai defect([^a-z]|$)|ai-detected|ai detected|artificial intelligence'
)
SELECT catalog_name, term, source_table, matched_value, COUNT(*) AS row_count
FROM matched
WHERE term IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY catalog_name, term, source_table, matched_value
ORDER BY term, row_count DESC
LIMIT 500
